fields.returns: An array of design-space coordinate values, one per variation axis, for the specified named instance.
fields.summary: Returns the design coordinate values for all axes of the specified named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: The number of coordinates written into <paramref name="coords" />.
fields.summary: Fills a span with the design coordinate values for the specified named instance.

params.coords: A span to receive the design-space coordinate values.
params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

entries.signature: public int GetNamedInstanceDesignCoords (int instanceIndex, Span<float> coords);

fields.returns: The total number of design-space coordinates for the specified named instance.
fields.summary: Returns the number of design coordinates for the specified named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> that identifies the PostScript name string in the font name table.
fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name-table ID for the PostScript name of the specified named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> that identifies the subfamily name string in the font name table.
fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name-table ID for the subfamily name of the specified named instance.

params.instanceIndex: The zero-based index of the named instance.

fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> that identifies the color name string in the font name table.
fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name-table ID for the display name of the specified color slot.

params.colorIndex: The zero-based index of the color slot across all palettes.

fields.returns: An array of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor" /> values representing the colors in the palette.
fields.summary: Returns all colors from the specified color palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.

fields.returns: The number of colors written into <paramref name="colors" />.
fields.summary: Fills a span with colors from the specified color palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.
params.colors: A span to receive the palette colors.

entries.signature: public int GetPaletteColors (int paletteIndex, Span<HarfBuzzSharp.HBColor> colors);

fields.returns: A <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeColorPaletteFlags" /> value describing the palette's intended usage.
fields.summary: Returns the flags associated with the specified color palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.

fields.returns: The <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeNameId" /> that identifies the palette name string in the font name table.
fields.summary: Returns the OpenType name-table ID for the display name of the specified color palette.

params.paletteIndex: The zero-based index of the palette.

fields.returns: The number of variation axis entries written into <paramref name="axes" />.
fields.summary: Fills a span with information about the font's variation axes.

params.axes: A span to receive the variation axis information.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains color glyph layers (COLR table); otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains COLRv0 or COLRv1 color glyph layers.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains PNG color glyphs (CBDT/CBLC or sbix table); otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains embedded PNG color glyphs.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains SVG color glyphs (SVG table); otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains SVG color glyphs.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains a CPAL (Color Palette) table; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains color palette data.

fields.value: <see langword="true" /> if the font contains variation data (fvar table); otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Gets a value indicating whether the font contains OpenType variable font data.

fields.value: The number of named variation instances in the font's fvar table, or 0 if the font has no variation data.
fields.summary: Gets the number of named instances defined in the font.

fields.value: The number of color palettes defined in the CPAL table, or 0 if the font has no palettes.
fields.summary: Gets the number of color palettes in the font.

fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the axis was found; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
fields.summary: Attempts to find a variation axis by its four-byte tag.

params.tag: The four-byte OpenType tag identifying the variation axis.
params.axisInfo: When this method returns, contains the variation axis information if the axis was found. This parameter is treated as uninitialized.

entries.signature: public bool TryFindVariationAxis (HarfBuzzSharp.Tag tag, out HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeVarAxisInfo axisInfo);

fields.value: The number of variation axes in the font's fvar table, or 0 if the font has no variation data.
fields.summary: Gets the number of variation axes defined in the font.

fields.value: An array of <see cref="T:HarfBuzzSharp.OpenTypeVarAxisInfo" /> values describing each variation axis, or an empty array if the font has no variation data.
fields.summary: Gets an array of information about all variation axes defined in the font.
